verdict_reason: The verse is the FIRST appearance of the equanimity doctrine (samatva) in the Gita and a doctrinally distinctive seed-statement. The engineering layer treats it with the structural rigor it requires: three pairs preserved, dispositional move not-erasure, foreshadowing of 2.47/2.48 honored without copying technical terms, pāpam → bondage rendering (Ramanuja) preserved as engineering-form-of-saṁsāra (burnout / blame-displacement / defensive code). Four commentaries with named traditions. The three-pair structure is operationalized through three concrete checkpoints (8 a.m. / 11 a.m. / 2 p.m.) anchored to specific tools (Datadog, retrospective with PM, competitor's public demo).
